title: Fantasy 2022 draft board + OSIG admin scratch — Jun 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • A 2022 fantasy-football draft cheat sheet: Yahir's tier rankings — WR top tier (Justin Jefferson, CeeDee Lamb starred 4x, Courtland Sutton round 4, Hollywood Brown, Pittman Jr, Mooney, Allen Robinson 2). RB tier: Derrick Henry (round 2), Najee Harris, Travis Etienne. Top imperative title: "GET JOSH ALLEN" — QB target conviction.
  • The fantasy league member list captures the 2022 boys-roster snapshot: YG, Owen, Luke, Riley, Ayden, Ryan, Kai, MQ, emilio — same crew that recurs in 2025 06 22 wedding list three years later.
  • Second cluster: OSIG admin tasks — export Excel as CSV, build pivot table with Janet, contact registrar Matt Story, add Belinda Sykes, follow up Kelsey Herman, update Confluence docs. Earliest concrete record of Yahir's OSIG internship work-product.
  • Bonus character list adds Henry, Nico, Hayden, Thien, Ian Cann, Luke's twin friends, MQuist, Emilio — a draft-pool of additional players for future leagues.

Key fact

"**get JOSH ALLEN" — opening directive, before the draft board.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Pairs with 2024 07 30 fantasy football and 2025 03 09 fantasy 2025 26 to form the fantasy-draft trilogy — same pattern, same season-by-season note format, three years running.
  • The OSIG task list is a rare snapshot of Yahir as employee-in-system — internal-tool work, registrar coordination — adjacent to the osig workbook note (2022 04 28 osig workbook).
  • Confirms Janet, Matt Story, Belinda Sykes, Kelsey Herman as OSIG-context names worth tracking if they recur.

Open questions

  • Did this draft strategy execute? Yahir's actual 2022 fantasy season outcome unknown.
  • Who's "MQ / MQuist"? Disambiguate from Mike Quist if needed.
